title: Homepage banner CRUD & display
description: Admin banner CRUD and active-banner display on the storefront homepage carousel.

inScope: Banner CRUD for admin (image, link, display order, active/inactive)
Active banner display on the storefront homepage carousel

acceptanceCriteria.text: Admin can create, edit, delete, and reorder banners
Admin can toggle a banner active/inactive
The homepage carousel shows only active banners in the configured order
